name: Peter Paul Mound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the cake according to the directions on the box.
2. Heat the milk, sugar, and marshmallows in a saucepan over medium heat until the mixture is melted and combined.
3. Add the coconut to the melted mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Split the cooked cake into 4 layers.
5. Space the cake layers with the coconut mixture evenly.
6. Frost the top of the cake with chocolate frosting.
